creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Landed: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=b8d235ae4f734d0737d3123afd8c3e2b2adb0848

i didn't do the update with your patch because there were many problems with i386 that i had solved differently.
But still a big thank you to you, and I hope you continue to submit such good patches! :-)
